Gallery

Theme Gallery

Contributing

Adding Themes

On this page

Theme Gallery ​

All 43 built-in themes organized by family. Each theme shows its surface ramp and accent hues.

Use presetTheme("name") to load any of these in code:

typescript
import { presetTheme } from "swatch"
const theme = presetTheme("catppuccin-mocha")

Catppuccin ​

The most popular 4-flavor theme system. Warm pastels on dark backgrounds, one light variant.

Catppuccin Mocha dark ​

RoleColorHex
crust#11111B
base#1E1E2E
surface#313244
overlay#6C7086
subtext#A6ADC8
text#CDD6F4
red#F38BA8
orange#FAB387
yellow#F9E2AF
green#A6E3A1
teal#94E2D5
blue#89B4FA
purple#CBA6F7
pink#F5C2E7

Nord ​

Arctic, north-bluish clean. A single dark variant with muted, harmonious colors.

Solarized ​

Ethan Schoonover's precision-engineered color scheme with both dark and light variants.

Tokyo Night ​

Clean dark theme inspired by Tokyo city lights. Three variants.

subtext#A9B1D6

Tokyo Night Storm dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#24283B
text#C0CAF5

Same accents as Tokyo Night. Slightly different crust (#1F2335).

Rose Pine ​

All natural pine, faux fur, and a bit of soho vibes.

Rose Pine dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#1F1D2E
text#E0DEF4
red#EB6F92
yellow#F6C177
teal#9CCFD8
purple#C4A7E7
pink#EBBCBA

Rose Pine Moon dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#2A273F
text#E0DEF4

Same accents as Rose Pine with a lighter base.

Rose Pine Dawn light ​

RoleColorHex
base#FFFAF3
text#575279
red#B4637A

Kanagawa ​

Inspired by Katsushika Hokusai's paintings. Three variants with Japanese-inspired naming.

Kanagawa Wave dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#1F1F28
text#DCD7BA
red#C34043
orange#FFA066
yellow#E6C384
green#98BB6C
blue#7E9CD8
purple#957FB8
pink#D27E99

Kanagawa Dragon dark ​

Muted, earthy dark variant. Base: #181616, text: #c5c9c5.

Kanagawa Lotus light ​

Light variant inspired by lotus flowers. Base: #f2ecbc, text: #545464.

Everforest ​

Green-toned comfortable color scheme. Two variants.

Everforest Dark dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#2d353b
text#d3c6aa
red#e67e80
yellow#dbbc7f
green#a7c080
blue#7fbbb3

Everforest Light light ​

Base: #fdf6e3, text: #5c6a72. Same hues in adjusted tones.

Monokai ​

The iconic syntax highlighting theme from Sublime Text.

Monokai dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#272822
text#F8F8F2
red#F92672
orange#FD971F
yellow#E6DB74
green#A6E22E
teal#66D9EF
purple#AE81FF

Monokai Pro dark ​

Modern, refined Monokai. Base: #2d2a2e, text: #fcfcfa. Balanced colors: red #ff6188, green #a9dc76, yellow #ffd866, purple #ab9df2.

Snazzy ​

Elegant dark theme with vivid colors by Sindre Sorhus.

Snazzy dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#282a36
text#eff0eb
red#ff5c57
yellow#f3f99d
green#5af78e
blue#57c7ff
pink#ff6ac1

Material ​

Material design-inspired editor themes.

Material Dark dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#212121
text#eeffff
red#ff5370
yellow#ffcb6b
green#c3e88d
blue#82aaff
purple#c792ea

Material Light light ​

Base: #fafafa, text: #546E7A. Same hue family in darker tones.

Palenight ​

Soft, purple-tinted Material dark variant.

Palenight dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#292d3e
text#a6accd
red#f07178
yellow#ffcb6b
green#c3e88d

purple#c792ea

Ayu ​

Warm, modern theme in three variants.

Ayu Dark dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#0B0E14
text#BFBDB6
red#D95757
orange#F29668
yellow#E6B450
green#AAD94C
blue#59C2FF
purple#D2A6FF

Ayu Mirage dark ​

Balanced dark variant. Base: #1F2430, text: #CCCAC2. Softer contrast with vibrant accents.

Ayu Light light ​

Clean light variant. Base: #F8F9FA, text: #5C6166. Deep accent tones.

Nightfox ​

Rich, vibrant themes for Neovim.

Nightfox dark ​

base#192330
text#CDCECF
red#C94F6D
yellow#DBC074
green#81B29A
teal#63CDCF
blue#719CD6
purple#9D79D6

Dawnfox light ​

Warm light variant. Base: #FAF4ED, text: #575279.

Horizon ​

Beautifully warm dark theme with vivid accents.

Oxocarbon ​

IBM Carbon Design-inspired theme. Clean, geometric colors.

base#161616

Sonokai ​

High-contrast vivid theme, Monokai Pro-inspired.

Edge ​

Clean, modern theme by sainnhe.

Edge Dark dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#2C2E34
text#C5CDD9
red#EC7279
green#A0C980
teal#5DBBC1
blue#6CB6EB
purple#D38AEA

Edge Light light ​

Base: #FAFAFA, text: #4B505B. Readable, clean light variant.

Modus ​

GNU Emacs themes by Protesilaos Stavrou. Conform to WCAG AAA contrast standards -- the most accessible themes in the collection.

Modus Vivendi dark ​

RoleColorHex
base#000000
text#FFFFFF
red#FF5F59
yellow#D0BC00
green#44BC44
teal#00D3D0
blue#2FAFFF
purple#B6A0FF
pink#FEACD0
